subject: [PATCH v6 21/22] vswap: batch contiguous vswap free calls

2026-05-05.patch_summary: This patch optimizes the vswap_free() function by batching contiguous free calls to reduce overhead on non-disk-swap backends, where releasing and reacquiring the cluster lock is unnecessary. The patch modifies the release_vswap_slot() function to take an additional argument for the number of slots to be released, allowing multiple frees to be batched together. This change improves performance by minimizing the number of lock acquisitions and releases.
